tech_news.title: Apple has finally discontinued the Mac Pro desktop after years of fitful effort - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: M2 Ultra Mac Pro is no longer for sale, and Apple says no replacement is planned.

tech_news.title: All iPhone 18 models might offer key design change, per leaker - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: A new leak indicates that one of iPhone 18 Pro’s rumored design changes—a smaller Dynamic Island—will apply to more iPhone 18 models too.

tech_news.title: Expanse: Osiris Reborn Dev Defends Using Gen AI For The RPG - Kotaku
tech_news.description: Owlcat Games confirmed that their upcoming Mass Effect-like RPG is being developed with some help from generative AI

tech_news.title: Android 17 Beta 3 finally restores the single tap Wi-Fi toggle - 9to5Google
tech_news.description: Google has decided to restore the ability to enable and disable Wi-Fi connections with a single tap of the QS toggle in Android 17 Beta 3.

tech_news.title: Blue Reflection Quartet announced for PS5, Switch 2, Switch, and PC - Gematsu
tech_news.description: Publisher Koei Tecmo and developer Gust have announced Blue Reflection series collection Blue Reflection Quartet for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, Switch, and PC (Steam), including console remakes of th…

tech_news.title: Sony is raising PS5 prices by $100 in April - The Verge
tech_news.description: Sony is raising the prices across all of its PS5 models, with the standard version costing $649.99 instead of $549.99.

tech_news.title: Saros has been made easier than Returnal due to player feedback, though creative director claims its still "a very challenging game" - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: According to Saros' creative director, the game has been made easier thanks to player complaints around Returnal not having auto saves or multiple save slots.

tech_news.title: New Resident Evil Requiem patch adds highly-anticipated photo mode feature - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: The powers that be at Capcom have released an update for Resident Evil Requiem, which along with other fixes and such also adds photo mode.

tech_news.title: Dispatch is finally coming to Xbox with Play Anywhere support this summer - TrueAchievements
tech_news.description: Following its 2025 launches on PS5 and PC, the excellent episodic adventure game Dispatch will launch on Xbox Series X|S later this year.
